title: Event-organizer liability/insurance pointer pack per jurisdiction (pointers, not advice)
context: Community repair event organizers frequently ask about liability and insurance. repair-cafe-kits does not provide legal or insurance advice; this pointer pack is a curated list of links to authoritative sources per jurisdiction (UK, US, EU) where organizers can seek local guidance — not a platform form, not legal advice, and not on-platform data collection. The content must carry a prominent 'this is not legal or insurance advice; seek local professional guidance' disclaimer. No verbatim copying of copyrighted legal text; links to authoritative bodies only.
objective: Compile a jurisdiction-organized pointer pack (UK, US, and at least one additional region) of authoritative links to liability/insurance guidance sources for community event organizers, with a prominent 'not legal advice' disclaimer and source-cited references, reviewed by an approver distinct from the author.
acceptanceCriteria: The pointer pack covers at least: UK, US, and one additional region (e.g. EU/Ireland/Australia); for each region, links to authoritative sources (e.g. relevant government or established charity/mutual-aid sector guidance on public liability insurance for community events) are provided

A prominent disclaimer is present on the unit: 'This pointer pack is not legal or insurance advice. Requirements vary by jurisdiction, venue, and activity. Consult a qualified legal or insurance professional for advice specific to your situation.'
No legal or insurance advice is given; content is limited to pointers to authoritative/official sources; no on-platform form collects personal data
No verbatim copying of copyrighted legal text; links and paraphrased summaries only; each source has retrievedDate, sourceLicense, and reusePermitted recorded

The unit is reviewed by an approver distinct from the author; a PR-tied review-log entry is written; the unit conforms to the data-002 schema, passes CI content-governance gates, and is published under CC-BY-4.0
output: A committed, schema-valid jurisdiction-organized liability/insurance pointer pack (CC-BY-4.0) with prominent 'not legal advice' disclaimer, sourced links only, and a PR-tied review-log entry with distinct author and approver.
